payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial beige upholstered wooden armchair with padded seat and back, dark turned wooden legs and stretchers visible; right/top edges of the chair are slightly cropped in the image; visible armrest and low profile suggest a small dining or accent chair approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"beige upholstered wooden chair edge-crop","long_description":"Partial beige upholstered wooden armchair with padded seat and back, dark turned wooden legs and stretchers visible; right/top edges of the chair are slightly cropped in the image; visible armrest and low profile suggest a small dining or accent chair approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["beige fabric upholstery","dark stained wooden frame","turned front legs","padded seat and back","visible armrest","edge-cropped (partial)","low-rise profile"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
